productDisplayName: Baggit Women Valley Hoor Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This three-fold timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 11 cm Crafted from leatherette and corduroy with a three-fold flap opening style Buckle detail on the upper and a press buttoned closure Ten card holders, one id card holder and two insert pockets A zipped compartment on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
